article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.3.2. REZ 25-05 Final Adoption Memo 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on final approval of six-storey self-storage facility at Still Creek Avenue
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on final adoption of a rezoning bylaw that would allow a six-storey self-storage building with underground parking at 3942–3944 Still Creek Avenue. All required conditions have been met by the applicant, and the bylaw is now being brought back to Council for its final vote.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the Council decision on March 10, 2026 — it could affect nearby businesses or competitors in the storage industry.

key_dates.label: Burnaby REZ 25-05 rezoning bylaw — Council final adoption vote

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Transportation & Logistics
